# Expected behaviors for custom-machineconfig scenario
# Tests: Agent creates MachineConfig using ai-docs patterns

Includes Documentation Used section at end of response
Lists AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md in Documentation Used
References at least one file from ./ai-docs/domain/
Mentions MachineConfig API or resource
Describes machineConfigSelector or labels for targeting pools
Mentions kernel parameters or sysctl configuration
Describes how to target worker pool specifically
Does NOT mention existing kernel parameter examples from codebase
